issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card activates when attacking.
Condition missing primary requirement: 'total of 4 or less cards in Life area and hand'. Current condition only checks for attached DON, which is not mentioned in the card text.

DSL is missing the second conditional action: 'If you have a Character with cost 8 or more, you may add up to 1 card from top of deck to top of Life cards instead of drawing.' Current DSL only includes DrawCard action.
No condition type exists in schema for checking combined card counts across zones (Life area + hand). This requires custom logic or multiple conditions.

suggestedDsl.note: Full implementation requires custom condition for 'total 4 or less in Life+hand' and conditional action selection between DrawCard and FlipLife
